cards.title: Slice 1 — Pilot detail page (intake, real DB)
cards.nextAction: Confirm PR CI green → user live-validation + merge sign-off

cards.title: Slice 2 — Progress pane
cards.nextAction: Write the Slice 2 plan after Slice 1 merges

cards.title: Auth/session + org-context (RLS enforcement on writes)
cards.phase: Deferred from Slice 1 (review C1): intake write-path runs on RLS-bypassing superuser conn; app.org_id never set; caseId trusted from URL
cards.nextAction: Build auth/session; derive org server-side; set_config('app.org_id') in write txn + wire a non-superuser app DB role; scope writes by org

cards.title: Audit-record immutability (case_event / verdict_snapshot RLS)
cards.phase: Slice-0 audit (medium): case_event + verdict_snapshot still FOR ALL — in-org UPDATE/DELETE of audit rows permitted
cards.nextAction: Split policies to SELECT-only on the audit tables (mirror fvh_select); keep append-only history

cards.title: Pin evaluate() to case.rulesVersion (not latest)
cards.phase: Merge-gate NIT (B8): detail page evaluates with latest RULES_VERSION, not the case row's pinned rulesVersion — identical today, but a rules bump would silently re-evaluate pinned cases
cards.nextAction: Thread case.rulesVersion into evaluate(); load the matching rules artifact
